description: Create a regulation baseball infield layout in LibreCAD and save it as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/baseball_infield.dxf. Use feet as units with the origin (0,0) at the apex of Home Plate and the Y-axis as the field centerline. The layout must include: foul lines extending at least 250ft at 45° and 135°; 15" square bases at 90ft from Home on the foul lines (1st and 3rd) and 2nd base centered at 127.28ft on the Y-axis; a pentagonal Home Plate at the origin; a 2ft x 0.5ft Pitcher's Plate with the front edge at Y=60.5ft; and a running lane offset 3ft from the 1st base line starting at 45ft. Organize the drawing into the following layers: FOUL_LINES (White), BASES (White), MOUND (Red), MARKINGS (Yellow), and DIMENSIONS (Cyan).
